title: Avocado Toast
description: A simple and delicious vegan dish made with toasted bread, mashed avocado, and a squeeze of lemon.
instructions: Toast the bread until it's lightly browned.
Mash the avocado in a bowl until it's smooth.
Spread the mashed avocado on the toasted bread.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the avocado.
Drizzle the apple cider vinegar over the avocado.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
